Package glide.api.models.commands

Class HSetExOptions.HSetExOptionsBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.api.models.commands.HSetExOptions.HSetExOptionsBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    HSetExOptions
    public static class HSetExOptions.HSetExOptionsBuilder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder class for HSetExOptions.

      Field conditional change option (FNX/FXX) for controlling when fields are set.
      HSetExOptions.HSetExOptionsBuilder onlyIfAllExist()
      Sets the field conditional change to only set fields if all of them already exist.
      HSetExOptions.HSetExOptionsBuilder onlyIfNoneExist()
      Sets the field conditional change to only set fields if none of them already exist.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    • Method Detail

      • onlyIfAllExist

        public HSetExOptions.HSetExOptionsBuilder onlyIfAllExist()
        Sets the field conditional change to only set fields if all of them already exist.

        This is equivalent to the FXX option in the Valkey HSETEX command. When this option is used, the command will only update existing fields and will not create new fields.

        Returns:
        this builder instance for method chaining
        See Also:
        FieldConditionalChange.ONLY_IF_ALL_EXIST

      • onlyIfNoneExist

        public HSetExOptions.HSetExOptionsBuilder onlyIfNoneExist()
        Sets the field conditional change to only set fields if none of them already exist.

        This is equivalent to the FNX option in the Valkey HSETEX command. When this option is used, the command will only create new fields and will not update existing fields.

        Returns:
        this builder instance for method chaining
        See Also:
        FieldConditionalChange.ONLY_IF_NONE_EXIST

      • fieldConditionalChange

        public HSetExOptions.HSetExOptionsBuilder fieldConditionalChange​(FieldConditionalChange fieldConditionalChange)
        Field conditional change option (FNX/FXX) for controlling when fields are set.
        Returns:
        this.

      • expiry

        public HSetExOptions.HSetExOptionsBuilder expiry​(ExpirySet expiry)
        Expiry configuration for the hash fields.
        Returns:
        this.

      • build

        public HSetExOptions build()
